## Summary

- Describe the change.

## Testing

- `go test ./...`
- Other verification: list any extra manual checks, commands, or screenshots

## Related

- Issue: link an issue if this PR closes or follows one
- Discussion: link a discussion if this change came from one

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `go test ./...`
- [ ] I updated docs when the user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] I explained the change and verification clearly
